description_long: This is a single-family house with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a well-maintained lawn and several mature trees. The front features a small porch with steps leading up to a central entry door, flanked by windows and shrubbery. The driveway is positioned to the left of the house, providing access to the property from the street. The rear and sides of the house are bordered by hedges and additional trees, offering privacy and greenery. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, while the sides and back have fewer, more spaced-out windows. The overall design is simple and functional, with a suburban residential character.
description: A light-colored, single-story house with a dark gable roof, front porch, and surrounding lawn with trees and hedges. The property includes a driveway and features symmetrical front windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entry porch, central door, symmetrical windows, driveway to the left, and dense landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain wall with a single window, extensive hedges, and more trees, with the driveway visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and thick greenery along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a similar plain wall with a single window, large tree, and driveway extending along the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with small porch, steps, and flanking windows, surrounded by shrubs and a paved walkway.
